summary: Tested Monthly Settlement Generation and Deliveries with Line-Item Calculations. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI displays all required columns and filters. Legacy settlements show ₹0.00 values as expected (data created before new fields were added).

issues: Legacy settlements (STL-2026-0002) show ₹0.00 for all calculation fields because they were created before the new monthly settlement fields were added. This is expected behavior per the test request.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Monthly Settlement Generation and Deliveries features are fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_monthly_settlements.py cover all endpoints. The distributor 99fb55dc-532c-4e85-b618-6b8a5e552c04 (Test) has 12 deliveries with line-item data. Existing settlements (2) are legacy and show ₹0.00 values. To test settlement generation, create new deliveries with 'delivered' status for a month that doesn't have settlements yet.

backend.details: Works with time_filter (this_week, last_week, this_month, last_month, last_3_months, last_6_months, this_year, lifetime), account_id filter, and pagination
Works with month and year query parameters. Returns deliveries with items array for calculations
Validates month/year required. Returns 400 if no unsettled deliveries found
Works with month and year filters. Returns settlements with pagination

frontend.details: Shows all columns: Delivery#, SKU, Qty, Customer Selling Price, Distributor Commission %, Total Customer Billing Value, Distributor Earnings, Transfer Price, Margin at Transfer Price, Adjustment Payable, Status, Actions
Time Period dropdown works (This Month, Lifetime, etc). Account dropdown present. Pagination works.
Shows columns: Settlement#, Month/Year, Account Name, No of Deliveries, Total Customer Billing Value, Distributor Earnings, Margin at Transfer Price, Adjustment Payable, Status, Actions
Month/Year selection works. Shows unsettled deliveries preview grouped by account. Refresh button works.
